title: CleanCut
description: Fight enemies back through grass and other similar obstructions!
body:
Fight enemies back through grass and other similar obstructions!


You will be able connect your attacks given:

1. You're at the right reach distance

2. Block has no collision

[Permission given here](https://github.com/Exoneration/.github/blob/main/profile/permission/rongmario.md)
